title: A Young Woman Standing Portrait AI
sourceTitle: A Young Woman Standing Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic black-and-white urban photographer portrait built around A young woman standing at the entrance of a NYC subway staircase (Christopher St Sheridan Sq sign visible)., compact mirrorless camera held carefully with both hands, Outfit: beige fitted ribbed turtleneck sweater with button details on the sleeves, high-waisted olive green tailored pants., and Background shows green metal railings, city street with pedestrians and taxis. Subject: A young woman standing at the entrance of a NYC subway staircase (Christopher St Sheridan Sq sign visible). stands on a city sidewalk holding compact mirrorless camera held carefully with both hands; Outfit: beige fitted ribbed turtleneck sweater with button details on the sleeves, high-waisted olive green tailored pants. defines the visible styling while the expression stays natural, focused, and documentary. Scene: Background shows green metal railings, city street with pedestrians and taxis. creates the urban backdrop with blurred passersby, ambient lights, storefront depth, and creamy street bokeh. Composition: Fixed vertical near-camera street portrait: subject standing on the sidewalk, camera held with both hands at chest level, camera strap visible, face clearly readable, shallow depth of field, and magazine-documentary hierarchy. Signature Elements: Mirrorless or rangefinder camera held with both hands, black wardrobe silhouette, blurred passersby, ambient street lights, delicate natural makeup, sharp expressive eyes, and heavy monochrome film grain. Style: Cinematic black-and-white editorial street photography with candid documentary atmosphere, timeless fashion-photo restraint, true-to-life portrait texture, heavy film grain, and high-end monochrome finish. Color Palette: Fixed high-contrast monochrome palette with deep blacks, bright facial highlights, soft gray midtones, creamy bokeh lights, and crisp black clothing separation. Lighting: Soft natural city light with readable facial structure, controlled shadows, subtle catchlights, and realistic texture without studio smoothing. Camera: 85mm portrait lens look, shallow depth of field, compressed urban background, creamy bokeh, close documentary crop, and crisp central facial focus. Materials: Camera body, lens glass, camera strap, knit fabric, wispy hair strands, city pavement, storefront reflections, and film-grain texture stay visible. Restrictions: Keep one coherent adult portrait subject, believable hands around the camera, natural expression, clear camera shape, black-and-white finish, and uncluttered street depth.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Style: Cinematic black-and-white editorial street photography with candid documentary atmosphere, timeless fashion-photo restraint, true-to-life portrait texture, heavy film grain, and high-end monochrome finish. Color Palette: Fixed high-contrast monochrome palette with deep blacks, bright facial highlights, soft gray midtones, creamy bokeh lights, and crisp black clothing separation. Lighting: Soft natural city light with readable facial structure, controlled shadows, subtle catchlights, and realistic texture without studio smoothing. Camera: 85mm portrait lens look, shallow depth of field, compressed urban background, creamy bokeh, close documentary crop, and crisp central facial focus. Materials: Camera body, lens glass, camera strap, knit fabric, wispy hair strands, city pavement, storefront reflections, and film-grain texture stay visible. Restrictions: Keep one coherent adult portrait subject, believable hands around the camera, natural expression, clear camera shape, black-and-white finish, and uncluttered street depth.
